faqs.a: Yes, we only use environmentally friendly cleaning solutions.

faqs.q: Can you clean high-rise windows safely?
faqs.a: Absolutely, our team is fully trained in working at heights.

faqs.q: How often should I have my windows cleaned?
faqs.a: We recommend a bi-monthly schedule for optimal cleanliness.
Yes, we provide discounts for regular cleaning contracts and referrals.
